what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG icon showing a document with a folded corner and a bulleted list inside it.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with viewBox 0 0 24 24 and explicit 24 width and height.
Sets fill to none and uses currentColor for strokes.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws the document outline and folded corner in one path.
Draws three horizontal list lines in a second path.
Draws three filled currentColor bullet circles with stroke disabled.
standouts: Combines a folded file shape with internal list marks.
Uses filled circles for bullets inside an otherwise stroked icon.
conventions: Follows a compact line-icon convention using currentColor inheritance.
Keeps all geometry inline in SVG primitives.
Uses round stroke styling for soft icon edges.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are present for standalone accessibility metadata.
notes: This is a currentColor file-list icon asset made from simple SVG paths and circles.
questions: Should this icon be decorative only, or should it carry an accessible label when rendered?
Is the explicit width and height required, or should sizing be fully controlled by consumers?
purpose_vs_actual: The file name implies a file-list icon, and the SVG content draws a file with bulleted list lines.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable file-list glyph that adapts to surrounding text or UI color through currentColor.
novelty: Filled bullet dots are mixed with stroked outline geometry in a small line-icon asset.
contribution: Contributes a compact document-with-list visual substrate using scalable SVG geometry and color inheritance.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG icon depicting a folded document containing three bullet-list rows.
intention_for_embedding: This asset was for representing a file or document list in a reusable icon system.
